response.justification: Candidate is a strong, versatile senior full-stack developer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud strategy influence at scale. The resume shows senior IC scope (Staff/Senior Software Developer) without principal-level architectural leadership, no advanced AI degree, and only nascent AI work — insufficient signal for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded and microservices at high scale (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, OSS founder of GISCollective, public speaker and workshop creator
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale the Principal role expects
Career level tops out at Staff/Senior IC — lacks Principal/Director-level scope advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product future state
Limited explicit cloud strategy depth (some AWS CDK exposure) and no Master's/PhD in an AI field

key_factors.factor: Insufficient recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs Principal/Director IC scope
Recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
